name: Minimalism & Swiss Style
description: Clean, grid-based, lots of whitespace, limited color palette. Content is king.
bestFor: Enterprise apps, dashboards, documentation, SaaS, professional services
keywords: minimal swiss clean grid whitespace content-first professional enterprise
effects: Sharp edges, thin borders, ample whitespace
antiPatterns: Cluttered layouts, excessive shadows, decorative elements

name: Neumorphism
description: Soft extruded shapes with subtle inner/outer shadows. Creates a calm, tactile feel.
bestFor: Health/wellness apps, meditation platforms, lifestyle, premium services
keywords: neumorphism soft shadow extruded tactile calm wellness health
effects: Inner shadows, outer shadows, soft pressed states
antiPatterns: Low contrast, poor accessibility, unclear interactive states

name: Glassmorphism
description: Frosted glass effect with backdrop blur, transparency, and layered depth.
bestFor: Modern SaaS, financial dashboards, creative portfolios, AI products
keywords: glassmorphism glass frosted blur transparent depth modern tech
effects: Backdrop blur (10-20px), semi-transparent backgrounds, border tint
antiPatterns: Overuse of blur, readability issues, heavy GPU cost

name: Brutalism
description: Raw, unfiltered design with bold typography, stark colors, and intentionally rough edges.
bestFor: Design portfolios, artistic projects, creative agencies, avant-garde brands
keywords: brutalism raw bold stark rough edgy artistic creative
effects: Hard shadows, thick borders, high contrast, oversized type
antiPatterns: Poor readability, lack of hierarchy, inaccessible color contrast

name: 3D & Hyperrealism
description: Photorealistic 3D elements with depth, lighting, and texture. Immersive visual experience.
bestFor: Gaming, product showcase, immersive experiences, luxury brands
keywords: 3d hyperrealism realistic depth lighting texture immersive gaming luxury
effects: 3D transforms, lighting effects, parallax depth, realistic shadows
antiPatterns: Long load times, performance issues, overwhelming visuals

name: Vibrant & Block-based
description: Bold color blocks, large typography, and strong visual sections. Energetic and confident.
bestFor: Startups, creative agencies, gaming, entertainment, youth brands
keywords: vibrant block bold color energetic startup creative youth
effects: Large color blocks, bold gradients, oversized headings
antiPatterns: Color overload, lack of whitespace, visual noise

name: Dark Mode (OLED)
description: True black backgrounds with vibrant accent colors. Saves battery on OLED screens.
bestFor: Night-mode apps, coding platforms, gaming, media consumption
keywords: dark oled true-black night mode gaming coding media
effects: True black (#000000) backgrounds, glowing accents, reduced brightness
antiPatterns: Low contrast text, pure white on black, missing light mode variant

name: Accessible & Ethical
description: Universal design with WCAG AAA compliance, inclusive color palettes, and ethical considerations.
bestFor: Government, healthcare, education, public services, accessibility-first products
keywords: accessible ethical inclusive wcag universal compliance government healthcare
effects: High contrast, large touch targets, readable typography
antiPatterns: Color-only indicators, small text, poor contrast, missing alt text

name: Claymorphism
description: Soft, rounded shapes with clay-like extrusion and warm colors. Playful and approachable.
bestFor: Educational apps, children's apps, SaaS, wellness
keywords: claymorphism clay soft rounded warm playful educational kids
effects: Extruded shapes, warm shadows, rounded corners (12-20px)
antiPatterns: Over-extrusion, limited color range, childish aesthetic for serious apps

name: Aurora UI
description: Smooth gradient meshes with flowing, organic color transitions. Dreamy and ethereal.
bestFor: Modern SaaS, creative agencies, wellness, lifestyle brands
keywords: aurora gradient mesh organic flowing dreamy ethereal creative

name: Retro-Futurism
